name: Zhul'yen Kurinyi v Kokotnitsakh
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Sour cream or plain yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince the onion.
2. Mince the mushrooms and the chicken together.
3. Cook the minced onion in 4 tablespoons melted butter until translucent.
4. Add the chicken-mushroom mixture to the pan and cook for 5 minutes, adding salt and pepper to taste.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the sour cream and nutmeg.
6. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
7. Spoon the chicken mixture into four ramekins and sprinkle with grated cheese.
8. Bake for 10 minutes before serving hot.
